ValidationRule.description: Confirmation English Address Cannot be empty !
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName ='LC', Credit_Insurance_Confirmation_Y_N__c =True, ISBLANK( Confirming_Bank_Address_English__c )), TRUE, FALSE)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: There is No Credit Insurance Confirmation,Confirmation English Address Cannot be Empty !
